OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Analyze grant intake project text, summarize recommendation signals, and return matching funding opportunities.
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: GrantIntakeAnalyzeProject

omniProcessElements.name: AnalyzeProjectApex
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "additionalInput" : { "searchText" : "=%searchText%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "AnalyzeProjectApex", "remoteClass" : "GrantIntakeOrchestrationGateway", "remoteMethod" : "analyzeProject", "remoteOptions" : { }, "responseJSONNode" : "analysis", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: FundingOpportunitySearch
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "DRXFundingOpportunitySearch", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : true, "label" : "FundingOpportunitySearch", "responseJSONNode" : "fundingSearch", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: Response
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "additionalOutput" : { "aiSummary" : "=%analysis:aiSummary%", "analysisErrorMessage" : "=IF(ISBLANK(%analysis:aiSummary%),'Unable to analyze project. Please try again.',null)", "analysisSuccess" : "=IF(ISBLANK(%analysis:aiSummary%),false,true)", "confidenceScore" : "=%analysis:confidenceScore%", "context" : { "aiSummary" : "=%analysis:aiSummary%", "analysisErrorMessage" : "=IF(ISBLANK(%analysis:aiSummary%),'Unable to analyze project. Please try again.',null)", "analysisSuccess" : "=IF(ISBLANK(%analysis:aiSummary%),false,true)", "confidenceScore" : "=%analysis:confidenceScore%", "fundingOpportunities" : "=%analysis:fundingOpportunities%", "keywords" : "=%analysis:keywords%", "recommendedFundingTypes" : "=%analysis:recommendedFundingTypes%" }, "fundingOpportunities" : "=%analysis:fundingOpportunities%", "keywords" : "=%analysis:keywords%", "recommendedFundingTypes" : "=%analysis:recommendedFundingTypes%" }, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "label" : "ResponseAction1", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true, "vlcResponseHeaders" : { } }
